to the
San GaMel va E)

City of Alharnbra
(818) s7 0-509 r,
February 15, 1991
Fes i-
'- '71"tlf
John wallace, Esq.
Legal Division
Fair Politica1 Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814
Re: Carnpaign Contribution from one rrlocalrr Prinarily
Forned committee to Another rrlocal" Primarily
Forrned committee
Dear Mr. Wallace:
This letter is being written as per your request.
FACTS:
1. on Aprit Io, 1990, a Special Municipal Election r^ra s
held in Alhambra on a city neasure seeking voter
approval to repeal an ordinance which prohibited
the sale of any hospital owned or leased by the
Cj,ty without obtaining voter approval of such a
sale.
2. committee No. I was forned by a group of citizens
to support the passage of this measure.
3. Committee No. I presently has approximately $800 in
funds and now wishes to dispose of these funds and
terrninate.
3. The Alharnbra City Council is now in the process of
calling a Special Municipal Election to be held on
June 4, I99l seeking voter approval of an advisory
neasure for the construction a new police facility.
4. Comnittee No. 2 has been formed by a group of
citizens to support the passage of this advisory
neasure.
QUESTION :
Can Conrnittee No. 1 contribute its surplus funds to
Commi,ttee No. 2?
The Government Code and FPPC Regulations are sil"ent
with respect to contributj.ons fron one erimarily
Formed Cornmj-ttee to another prinarily 
Formed
Committee, both of whi-ch were forrned to support or
oppose a citv rreasure.


John wal,1ace, Esq.
February l-5, 1991
Page 2
RESPONSE:
This will confirm your verbal response to rne this
morning that given the above set of circunstances
Committee No. I legally nay contribute funds to
committee No- 2.
If my understanding of your response is incorrect,
please notify me at once by telephone in order that I
may so notify the two committees.
Thank you for your assistance.
very truly yours,
FRANCES A. MOORE, CMC
CITY CLERK
cc: Mr. Uark Paulson, Treasurer
Help our City
Mr. Lawrence G. Se1igman, Treasurer
Alhambra C j.tizens Agaj,nst Crime
